class.name: PlaybackStats
class.brief_description: Tracks jitter buffer and playback ring buffer metrics for a voice chat player.
class.description: PlaybackStats collects runtime statistics for a single remote player's voice playback pipeline. It tracks the playback ring buffer fill level, pushed and discarded frame counts, jitter buffer size, and playback position. These metrics are used by [Speech] for adaptive jitter buffer tuning and can be queried via [method get_playback_stats] for debugging or display.

method.name: get_playback_stats
method.description: Returns a [Dictionary] containing all collected playback statistics, including sample rates, ring buffer fill levels, pushed and discarded frame counts, jitter buffer size averages, playback position, and skip counts.
